heading: Employment of additional administrative assistants
label: 6538 Employment of additional administrative assistants
text: The Secretary of the Senate is authorized to employ such administrative assistants as may be necessary in order to carry out the provisions of this Act under the jurisdiction of the Secretary.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, means , , known as the Legislative Reorganization Act of 1946. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 75360 Stat. 812
CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 74b of this title
Amendments1996— substituted “is” for “and the Clerk of the House are” and “the jurisdiction of the Secretary” for “their respective jurisdictions”.Pub. L. 104–186
